title: GMRC Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) has released the official Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock) Notification 2026 on 27 April 2026 at its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the GMRC Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 45 to 57 years with a qualification of Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Electrical / Mechanical / Electronics & Communication) can apply via email on or before 26 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 57 years Age may be relaxed for exceptional candidates having higher qualifications and experience in implementation of a Metro Rail Project.

qualification.details: Director : Graduate having Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Electrical / Mechanical / Electronics & Communication) from a University or institute recognized by the Govt. of India or a State Government. A proven track record of Twenty Five (25) years of Group 'A' / Executive Service in Railways or equivalent, including Railway PSUs/Metro Rail Corporations/PSUs/Metro Rail or MRTS private organisations. 5 years experience out of the Twenty Five (25) years mentioned above in Metro Rail / Rolling Stock /Railway Electrification / Traction/ E&M/ Signaling & Telecommunications.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GMRC Director Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
